0.details: I was sad and heartbroken to hear about your grandmother's death. I can only imagine how deeply the pain is for every member of the family. I will never forget the summer we all spent together. Grandma told us many stories by moonlight. We laughed; she had this gift for making everyone laugh and feel included. I know words can't make this easier but please know you are not alone. I'm here for you in every step of the way.
0.model_generation:
Dear friend,

I was saddened and heartbroken to hear of your grandmother’s passing. I can only imagine how deep the pain runs through every member of your family at this time. I will never forget the summer we all spent together under starry skies, when Grandma regaled us with her stories by moonlight. Her laughter was contagious, her warmth bound us together, and her gift for making everyone feel included is a treasure I carry with me always.

Though words cannot ease the ache in your heart, please know you are not alone. I am here to listen, to share memories, or simply to sit quietly with you. Lean on me for whatever you need in the days ahead: a shoulder to cry on, a friend to talk to, or someone to sit in comfortable silence. I will cherish every memory of her kindness and humor.

With heartfelt sympathy,  
Your friend
0.final_version:
Dear friend,

I was saddened and heartbroken to hear of your grandmother’s passing. I can only imagine how deep the pain runs through every member of your family at this time. I will never forget the summer we all spent together under starry skies, when Grandma regaled us with her stories by moonlight. Her laughter was contagious, her warmth bound us together, and her gift for making everyone feel included is a treasure I carry with me always. She had a generous spirit, always the first to help, the last to complain. I learnt so much from the way she treated people with kindness and patience.

Though words cannot ease the ache in your heart, please know you are not alone. I am here to listen, to share memories, or simply to sit quietly with you. Lean on me for whatever you need in the days ahead: a shoulder to cry on, a friend to talk to, or someone to sit in comfortable silence. I will cherish every memory of her kindness and humor.

With heartfelt sympathy,  
Your friend

1.details:
I have been thinking a lot about our argument last month. I realized that when I snapped at you during lunch, it was hurtful and unfair. You didn't deserve it, babe.
I can see how my words hurt you and made you feel unappreciated, especially after all the effort you put in making and planning the lunch. It hurts me to know I made you feel that way.
You mean so much to me, and I do not want this mistake to stand between us. Our friendship has always been a source of comfort. I am deeply sorry. Thank you for hearing me out.
1.model_generation:
Hey babe,

I’ve been thinking a lot about our argument last month. I realized that snapping at you during lunch was both hurtful and unfair, and you didn’t deserve it. You put so much effort into making and planning that meal, and I made you feel unappreciated. It pains me to know my words hurt you. I cherish every moment we share and value the unwavering support you’ve always given me.

You mean so much to me—our friendship has always been a source of comfort and joy. I deeply regret letting my frustration get the better of me, and I’m truly sorry for the pain I caused. I promise to be more mindful of my words and to show the gratitude you deserve.

Thank you for hearing me out and for your patience. I hope we can move past this and continue growing together.

With all my love,
1.final_version:
Hey babe,

I’ve been thinking a lot about our argument last month. I realized that snapping at you during lunch was both hurtful and unfair, and you didn’t deserve it. You put so much effort into making and planning that meal, and I made you feel unappreciated. It pains me to know my words hurt you. I cherish every moment we share and value the unwavering support you’ve always given me.

You mean so much to me, and our friendship has always been a source of comfort and joy. I deeply regret letting my pain get the better of me, and I’m truly sorry for the pain I caused. I promise to be more mindful of my words and to show the gratitude you deserve.

Thank you for hearing me out and for your patience. I hope we can move past this and continue growing together.

With all my love,

2.details:
From the moment we met at that shopping mall in the early hours of the morning, i knew there was something different about you.
I love the moments and days we spent together, travelling to places, hiking, and swimming together.
Over the past three years, we've built a life full of laughter, challenges, late nights, and victory, and through it all, your love has remained my constant.
you are my best friend, my partner, and my precious gift from God. I can't wait to spend the rest of my life with you.
2.model_generation: From the moment we met at that quiet shopping mall in the early hours of the morning, I sensed something extraordinary in you. Since then, every adventure we’ve shared—whether traveling to new places, hiking rugged trails, or swimming beneath the sun—has filled my heart with joy and wonder. Over these past three years we’ve built a life woven from laughter and challenges, late nights and victories, and through it all, your love has been my unwavering anchor. You are my best friend, my partner, and a precious gift from God. Today, I promise to stand by your side in every season: to celebrate our triumphs, to lift you when you’re weary, and to grow alongside you in faith and love. I vow to listen with compassion, to speak with honesty, and to cherish you every moment. I can’t wait to spend the rest of my life loving you.
2.final_version: From the moment we met at that quiet shopping mall in the early hours of the morning, I sensed something extraordinary in you. Since then, every adventure we’ve shared, whether traveling to new places, hiking rugged trails, or swimming beneath the sun, has filled my heart with joy and wonder. Over these past three years, we’ve built a life woven from laughter and challenges, late nights and victories, and through it all, your love has been my unwavering anchor. You are my best friend, my partner, and a precious gift from God. Today, I promise to stand by your side in every season: to celebrate our triumphs, to lift you when you’re weary, and to grow alongside you in faith and love. I vow to listen with compassion, to speak with honesty, and to cherish you every moment. I can’t wait to spend the rest of my life loving you. I love you my forever.

3.details:
For those who do not know me, I am Maa, i have been a friend of Joy, or you can say Joy's best friend, since our first year in college.
I will never forget the day we took a wrong turn on our road trip to the mountains and ended up three hours. Instead of panicking, Joy laughed so hard.
Seeing  Joy and John together, it is clear they bring out the best in each other. So here is to love that grows stronger with time, to friendship that lasts forever.
3.model_generation: Good evening everyone. For those who do not know me, I am Maa, Joy’s best friend since our first year in college. From late-night study sessions to spontaneous road trips, we have shared so many adventures. I will never forget the day we took a wrong turn on our way to the mountains and ended up three hours off course. Instead of panicking, Joy laughed so hard that I forgot to stress, and that moment captured her spirit perfectly. She brings light and joy to every situation, and today she shines brighter than ever beside John. Watching their love grow, I’ve seen how they challenge and support each other, how they find laughter in the little things, and how their bond deepens with every passing day. Please raise your glasses to love that grows stronger with time, to friendship that lasts forever, and to a lifetime of happiness for these two wonderful souls. Cheers!
3.final_version: Good evening, everyone. For those who do not know me, I am Maa, Joy’s best friend since our first year in college. From late-night study sessions to spontaneous road trips, we have shared so many adventures. I will never forget the day we took a wrong turn on our way to the mountains and ended up three hours off course. Instead of panicking, Joy laughed so hard that I forgot to stress, and that moment captured her spirit perfectly. She brings light and joy to every situation; she has an incredible ability to make everyone around her feel seen. and today she shines brighter than ever beside John. Watching their love grow, I’ve seen how they challenge and support each other, how they find laughter in the little things, and how their bond deepens with every passing day. Please raise your glasses to love that grows stronger with time, to friendship that lasts forever, and to a lifetime of happiness for these two wonderful souls. Cheers! Thank you all for coming.

4.details:
Dear Ruth, i just want to take a moment to thank you, not only as a friend but as someone who has been such an incredible support to me and hubby.
When hubby had a business setback, you helped out in both finance and encouragement. I cannot take that for granted.
4.model_generation:
Dear Ruth,

I just want to take a moment to thank you, not only as a friend but as someone who has been such an incredible support to my husband and me. When my husband faced that unexpected business setback, your generosity in both financial assistance and encouraging words lifted us in our darkest days. Your kindness eased our stress and restored our confidence when we needed it most, and we will never take your help for granted. Beyond the practical support, your unwavering belief in our abilities reminded us of the power of friendship and community. We are truly grateful for your compassion, guidance, and the countless ways you have shown up for us. Please know how much we cherish and appreciate you. Thank you for standing by our side and for being the remarkable friend that you are.

With love and appreciation,
4.final_version:
Dear Ruth, I want to use this opportunity to thank you for all you've done for me and hubby. You are not just a friend but also a loving soul. I remember when hubby had a business setback, you stood in for us with both your finance and encouragement. I will not take that for granted. You showed us love in a way we could not have imagined, you helped us stand again. You've always been the kind friend who shows up, quietly, consistently, and wholeheartedly. It is something I deeply admire. We both owe you and would like to start with a proper dinner soon.
 Thank you again for being an amazing friend that you are. Thank you for your unique way of showing and loving me and everything that has to do with me. I am deeply grateful and will not trade this for anything.


with love and gratitude.
Joyce

5.details: I know you've been feeling overwhelmed with the pressure at work lately, the long hours and endless deadlines have taken a toll on you, I understand it all. It has never been easy. Just hang in there, everything will be fine soon.
5.model_generation: I know how overwhelming work has felt lately. The relentless deadlines, long hours, and mounting pressure can wear anyone down. You’ve poured your energy into each task, stayed late to get it right, and pushed through exhaustion time and again. It hasn’t been easy. But I want you to know how proud I am of your dedication and resilience. You’ve faced challenges before and emerged stronger. This tough period won’t last forever. Remember to take moments for yourself, breathe, and recharge—small breaks can make a big difference. Lean on support when you need it, and celebrate each step forward, no matter how small. You are capable, resourceful, and on the right path. Trust in your skills and remember that brighter days are ahead. Hang in there—you’ve got this, and soon all your hard work will pay off.
5.final_version: Hi Dearies, I know work has been hectic these past weeks, and it has been taking a toll on you. I understand it all. I have seen how hard you are working, how much heart you put into everything you do. Even when you're tired and weak, you keep showing up. This is one incredible thing I love about you. You do not have to carry all of this alone. I am here to listen when you need to vent, and we laugh it out. I am here when you need me to sit quietly and watch you do the magic. You are a rare gem, you are capable, and I completely believe in you and the wonders you can do. No matter what happens next, just know you are the best among the rest, and we will face it all together. I love you and I am super proud of you.
